title: pyrus decipiens
intro: Pyrus decipiens, also known as the Chinese pear or Asian pear, is a species of deciduous tree or shrub native to China and Korea. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus decipiens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pyrus decipiens may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
